2026-04-15T19:12:52.8872689Z ##[endgroup]
2026-04-15T19:12:52.9728004Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-15T19:12:52.9728573Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:52.9729349Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:52.9729762Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:52.9730081Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:52.9730325Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:52.9730492Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:52.9730672Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:52.9730849Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:52.9731083Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:52.9731289Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:52.9731580Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:52.9731841Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:52.9732059Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:52.9732325Z [36;1mecho "Safe Outputs MCP server will run on port ${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-15T19:12:52.9753383Z shell: /usr/bin/bash -e {0}
2026-04-15T19:12:52.9753627Z env:
